ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lenders" (
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lender */,
  "lender_name" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the lender */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the lender */,
  "lender_address" TEXT /* Full address of the lender */,
  "lender_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the lender */,
  "lender_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the lender */,
  "lender_website" TEXT /* Website of the lender */,
  "lender_type" TEXT /* Type of lender (e.g., bank, credit union, online lender) */,
  "lender_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the lender */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the lender record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lender record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the lender record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lender record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_types" (
  "business_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business type */,
  "business_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the business type (e.g., Corporation, Subchapter S Corporation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the business type record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the business type record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the business type record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the business type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "naics_codes" (
  "naics_code" INTEGER /* NAICS code for the industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the NAICS code record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the NAICS code record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the NAICS code record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the NAICS code record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the business owner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the business owner */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Veteran status of the business owner */,
  "nonprofit_status" TEXT /* Nonprofit status of the business (Y for Yes, N for No) */,
  "demographic_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the demographic entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the demographic record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the demographic record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the city */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the city record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the city record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the city record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the city record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., government official, lender, business owner) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the loan data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the loan data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access log record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., application, approval letter) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the document for integrity verification */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the document record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the document record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the loan data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
